cards.back: The unfair or discriminatory treatment of data in an algorithm, often resulting in biased decisions
The practice of isolating data within an organization or system, making it inaccessible to other parties and limiting its potential for collaboration and innovation
The online record of an individual's activities, interactions, and data generated by their use of digital technologies
The loss of employment opportunities due to automation or AI systems replacing human workers in certain industries or roles
The practice of collecting and monetizing personal data for profit, often without users' knowledge or consent, in order to create targeted advertising and influence consumer behavior
